name: ARTESIAN RESOURCES CORP
summary: Artesian Resources Corporation is a Delaware holding company incorporated in 1927, operating seven wholly-owned subsidiaries providing water, wastewater, and related services in Delaware, Maryland, and Pennsylvania. Its principal subsidiary, Artesian Water Company, is the oldest and largest investor-owned public water utility on the Delmarva Peninsula, serving residential, commercial, industrial, municipal, and utility customers. Services include water distribution, wastewater treatment, contract water and wastewater operations, and Service Line Protection Plans.

products.name: Water Distribution Service
products.description: Distributes and sells water to residential, commercial, industrial, governmental, municipal and utility customers in Delaware, Maryland, and Pennsylvania.

products.name: Wastewater Service
products.description: Provides wastewater collection and treatment services to customers in Delaware and Maryland.

products.name: Contract Water and Wastewater Operations
products.description: Provides contract operation services for private, municipal, and state water and wastewater providers.

products.name: Service Line Protection Plans
products.description: Offers water, sewer, and internal Service Line Protection Plans to customers.

products.name: Fire Protection Service
products.description: Provides water for public and private fire protection to customers in service territories.

partnerships.description: Interconnection agreement effective January 1, 2022 through December 31, 2026 with automatic five-year renewals; includes take or pay clause requiring minimum purchase of 0.5 million gallons per day.
